name: Brand Voice
description: AI-powered brand consistency enforcement. Discovers brand materials across Confluence, Google Drive, Box, SharePoint, Slack, and Gong; generates LLM-ready guidelines; enforces voice across all AI-generated content.
review: Official Anthropic partnership plugin. Transforms brand knowledge across enterprise platforms into AI-enforceable guidelines. Excellent documentation, proven architecture, active maintenance. Solves critical gap in brand consistency for AI-generated content.
